transcript:
CALLER: Hi. I've been seeing Dr. Amol Sawant for my lungs. Is he available next week? I want to make sure before I travel from Nashik.
AGENT: Hello! I appreciate you calling ahead — coming from Nashik makes planning important. You're asking about Dr. Amol Sawant specifically next week?
CALLER: Yes. I don't want to travel and then find out he's on leave.
AGENT: Completely understandable. But I have to be upfront — I can't confirm a specific doctor's leave status or exact schedule from this line. Visiting consultant schedules can change and I'd hate for you to travel based on wrong information from me.
CALLER: Then who can confirm this?
AGENT: Our reception staff have real-time access to all doctor schedules. Let me connect you to them right now — they'll confirm Dr. Sawant's availability for next week accurately.
CALLER: Yes please, connect me.
AGENT: Of course — let me connect you to our staff now. Please hold.
